title: ContextLattice Orchestrator Environment Configuration
description: Environment variables for ContextLattice orchestrator connection. This file is typically stored as orchestrator.env and loaded as environment variables.

$schema.title: Schema Reference
$schema.description: URL to this JSON schema file for IDE validation

CONTEXTLATTICE_ORCHESTRATOR_URL.title: Orchestrator URL
CONTEXTLATTICE_ORCHESTRATOR_URL.description: URL of the ContextLattice orchestrator API endpoint

CONTEXTLATTICE_ORCHESTRATOR_API_KEY.title: API Key
CONTEXTLATTICE_ORCHESTRATOR_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticating with the ContextLattice orchestrator. Store securely and do not commit to version control.

CONTEXTLATTICE_PROJECT_NAME.title: Project Name
CONTEXTLATTICE_PROJECT_NAME.description: Default project name for ContextLattice operations

CONTEXTLATTICE_TIMEOUT.title: Request Timeout
CONTEXTLATTICE_TIMEOUT.description: Default timeout in seconds for API requests

CONTEXTLATTICE_RETRY_COUNT.title: Retry Count
CONTEXTLATTICE_RETRY_COUNT.description: Number of retries for failed requests
